findingsNew.title: design-interface SKILL.md exceeds the sk-doc package size recommendation
Smart-router block lacks the sk-doc marker functions expected by the package checker
Transform-application guidance is orphaned from the router and /design:interface command projection

traceabilityChecks.skdocPackageCheck: pass-with-warnings: two warnings recorded as P2 findings
traceabilityChecks.packetSkillName: pass: registry packetSkillName matches packet folder and SKILL.md frontmatter
traceabilityChecks.proceduresPath: pass: registry proceduresPath resolves to the six procedure cards documented by SKILL.md/README/feature catalog/playbook
traceabilityChecks.toolSurface: pass: registry allowed/forbidden tools match SKILL.md direct-fallback contract
traceabilityChecks.commandMetadata: partial: /design:interface matches packet identity and procedure structure, but transform projections omit transform_application.md
traceabilityChecks.orphanScan: partial: transform_application.md is packet-local guidance not referenced by router RESOURCE_MAP or command metadata

title: design-interface SKILL.md exceeds the sk-doc package size recommendation
evidenceRefs: package_skill.py --check output: SKILL.md has 4173 words (recommended max: 3000)
scopeProof: package check warning is isolated to design-interface/SKILL.md
recommendation: Move non-routing explanatory detail into packet references while preserving runtime-critical routing and rules.

title: Smart-router block lacks the sk-doc marker functions expected by the package checker
evidenceRefs: package_skill.py --check output: SMART ROUTING section missing smart-router marker(s): discover_markdown_resources, _guard_in_skill, UNKNOWN_FALLBACK
scopeProof: grep found no discover_markdown_resources, _guard_in_skill, or UNKNOWN_FALLBACK in design-interface/SKILL.md
recommendation: Add the expected smart-router marker scaffold or update the checker/template contract if the compact parseable model is intentional.

title: Transform-application guidance is orphaned from the router and /design:interface command projection
scopeProof: grep for transform_application|bolder|quieter|distill|delight|clarify under design-interface found transform_application.md and generic SKILL routing text, but no RESOURCE_MAP linkage to transform_application.md.
recommendation: Wire transform_application.md into the relevant interface transform intent/resource map and command projection reference sources, or delete/merge it if other references are canonical.

reason: P2-only findings; no P0/P1 blockers in assigned traceability/maintainability/sk-doc pass.

name: skdocPackageCheck
notes: Warnings recorded as P2 findings per charter.

name: commandMetadataProjection
notes: Identity/procedure claims pass; transform-specific lane is not referenced.
